case_title: JOSHUA WILLIAMSON VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC LLC (THC)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SAM MEKI--SUPPORTIVE HOUSING MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMSON, JOSHUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC LLC (THC) AOS: STEVE SHUBERT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
